escalation.rationale: Renewed US strikes on Iran amid fragile peace talks, Russian systematic strikes warning on Kyiv, and continued military operations across multiple theaters.

ticker_items: US conducts 'self-defense strikes' on Iranian targets amid ongoing talks
Russia warns diplomats to flee Kyiv, threatens 'systematic strikes'
Iran claims downing US drone, threatens devastating response
Ukraine launches 100+ drones overnight against Russian positions
British Navy prepares Strait of Hormuz mine-clearing mission

eastern_europe.description: Russia threatens systematic and consistent strikes on Ukrainian capital.
Russia launched over 100 drones and two ballistic missiles at Ukraine overnight.
Ukrainian drone strike hit Russian college facility.

middle_east.description: US forces attacked Iranian missile sites and boats near Strait of Hormuz.
Israeli forces intensify strikes against Hezbollah positions.
US conducted self-defense strikes against Iranian targets including boats and missile sites.
Israeli airstrikes overnight forced renewed displacement from southern Lebanese city.

claimed_totals.claim: US-Israel attacks on Iran total deaths
US-Israel attacks on Iran total deaths

russia.text: Washington should evacuate its embassy because Moscow is planning systematic strikes
russia.speaker: Sergei Lavrov
russia.title: Foreign Minister

middle_east.text: Regional countries would no longer be shields for US bases
middle_east.speaker: Mojtaba Khamenei
middle_east.title: Supreme Leader

middle_east.text: Washington remained ready to mediate in the war between Russia and Ukraine
middle_east.speaker: Marco Rubio
middle_east.title: US Secretary of State

observers.description: Reports indicate China secretly trained Russian troops, some of whom have fought in Ukraine. Xi Jinping and Putin signed 20 cooperation pacts at Beijing summit, though anticipated pipeline deal did not materialize.
Qatar emerges as key broker hosting Iranian delegation for talks on extending ceasefire and resolving frozen funds dispute with US.
Trump deploys additional 5,000 US troops to Poland following election of conservative President Karol Nawrocki, reversing Pentagon cancellation.
British Navy preparing mine-clearing operations in Strait of Hormuz while stationed off Gibraltar. UK also imposed new sanctions on crypto networks funding Russian war efforts totaling $1.5 billion.
Deployed 8,000 troops, fighter squadron, and Chinese air defense systems to Saudi Arabia under mutual defense treaty. Deployments began in early April 2026.

financial.notes: Oil prices mixed after US strikes on Iranian forces, while stocks rose as investors shrugged off renewed Iran fighting.

update_log.text: Iran claims downing US drone and firing at F-35 fighter jet over airspace violation
Russia warns foreign diplomats to leave Kyiv citing planned systematic strikes on capital
US CENTCOM confirms self-defense strikes on Iranian targets in southern Iran
Ukraine reports Russia launched over 100 drones and two ballistic missiles overnight
Russia warns US to evacuate citizens from Kyiv ahead of systematic strikes
US forces strike Iranian missile sites near Strait of Hormuz during Qatar talks
Israeli forces kill at least two in intensified southern Lebanon strikes
Iran's Supreme Leader warns regional states won't shield US bases
